Package
Description
org.episteme.natural.biology.loaders.neuroml
NeuroML loader for computational neuroscience models.
org.episteme.natural.biology.neuroscience
 
  • Classes in org.episteme.natural.biology.neuroscience used by org.episteme.natural.biology.loaders.neuroml
    Class
    Description
    NeuralNetwork
    Represents a neural network composed of neurons and synapses.
    Neuron
    Represents a neuron in a neural network.
    NeuronMorphology
    Represents the morphology of a neuron (dendrites, axons, segments).
  • Classes in org.episteme.natural.biology.neuroscience used by org.episteme.natural.biology.neuroscience
    Class
    Description
    Neuron
    Represents a neuron in a neural network.
    NeuronMorphology
    Represents the morphology of a neuron (dendrites, axons, segments).
    NeuronMorphology.Segment
     
    SpikingNeuron
    Spiking Neuron model.
    Synapse
    Synapse connecting two neurons.
